name: Theodosia the Virgin
troparia: (Tone 4) You rightly and pleasingly attained virtue, O martyr,* and became a pure dwelling of Christ,* the beloved abode of the Holy Spirit.* Therefore, having suffered well, you put to shame the enemy who wages war against the human race,* and you cut down Copronymus with the sword of the Faith, O Theodosia;* you have passed over to the heavenly bridal chamber, rejoicing.** Ask great mercy for those who honor you with faith.
kontakia: (Tone 2) Through labors, O martyr, you attained a labor-less life,* and by your blood you choke Copronymus, the enemy of the Church of Christ,* O all-blessed Theodosia,* and rejoicing with the armies on high,* you protect those who honor your memory.
